## 📚 Question Type
- [ ] **Resource Related** - Question about a specific resource in the collection
- [ ] **JavaScript Concept** - Question about a JavaScript concept or mechanism
- [ ] **Project Usage** - Question about how to use this resource collection
- [ ] **Contributing** - Question about how to contribute to the project
- [ ] **Technical Issue** - Question about a technical problem you're experiencing
- [ ] **General** - General question about the project

---
**Note:** For JavaScript concept questions, consider also checking:
- [MDN Web Docs](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript)
- [JavaScript.info](https://javascript.info/)
- [Stack Overflow](https://stackoverflow.com/questions/tagged/javascript)

For urgent technical support, consider posting on Stack Overflow with the `javascript` tag.
